About The Event

The World's First Live-Streamed
Reality Experience

EmpireX is where live streaming groups from around the world come together in luxury Airbnbs, settle group rivalries, create content, and party — all broadcasted LIVE on Kick to thousands of viewers. Compete for social influence and a CASH PRIZE across 5 unforgettable days in Florida.

When

June 11–15, 2026

Where

Kissimmee, Florida & surrounding cities within a 15–30 mile radius

Streaming Partner

Partnered with Kick — our first trip streaming live to thousands of viewers

Access

Invite only. Follow @our.empire on Instagram to RSVP

Your Pass In

Official EmpireX Wristbands

Every verified attendee receives a branded Our Empire wristband upon check-in. Your wristband is your access pass to all our.empire hosted parties & content events, throughout the 5 days. ECX wristbands will be similar in style to past trips.

⚠️ No wristband = No entry. Imposters will be escorted out by security.
Featured Group

Sky9

🏆 Hall of Fame Group

Hall of Fame group Sky9 is officially confirmed for EmpireX. They will be co-hosting the opening kickoff with the Our.Empire team on Day 1.

📅

Wristband Admission

June 11, 2026 • 9:00 PM – 12:00 AM

🏠

Property

Private luxury home with pool — Sky9 Group house

Your Safety Matters

Safety & Security

🛡️

Licensed Security

Professional & licensed security will be present at all Airbnb parties to ensure a safe and positive experience.

🤝

Wristband Access

Every verified attendee receives a branded wristband. Anyone without one will be escorted out immediately.

💪

Comfort First

Safety & comfort of all attendees, especially women, is our #1 priority. If you feel unsafe, notify security immediately.

Follow @our.empire on Instagram to receive your invite. This is invite-only — don’t miss out.
